name: HubSpot Email Sync
description: Sync your Contentful content with HubSpot Marketing Emails

installation.name: HubSpot API Key
installation.description: Your HubSpot private app API key (starts with 'pat-')

functions.name: HubSpot Email Function
functions.description: Sync Contentful Entries to HubSpot Marketing Emails

actions.name: Sync to HubSpot
actions.description: Syncs the current entry to HubSpot as a marketing email.

parameters.name: HTTP Method
parameters.description: The HTTP method to use for the HubSpot API (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE).

parameters.name: Email ID
parameters.description: The ID of the HubSpot email (required for PATCH and DELETE).

parameters.name: Email Name
parameters.description: The name of the HubSpot email (for POST and PATCH).

parameters.name: Subject
parameters.description: The subject of the HubSpot email (for POST and PATCH).

parameters.name: From Name
parameters.description: The sender name for the HubSpot email (for POST and PATCH).

parameters.name: Reply To
parameters.description: The reply-to address for the HubSpot email (for POST and PATCH).

parameters.name: Content Blocks
parameters.description: The content blocks for the HubSpot email (for POST and PATCH).
